_source: Hand-derived from the 12-point monthly return series R = [0.03,-0.02,0.05,-0.01,0.02,0.04,-0.03,0.01,0.06,-0.02,0.03,0.02], MAR=0. mean(R)=0.18/12=0.015. Below-target squared shortfalls (the 4 negatives -0.02,-0.01,-0.03,-0.02): sum = 0.0004+0.0001+0.0009+0.0004 = 0.0018. DownsideDeviationFullSample = sqrt(0.0018/12) = sqrt(1.5e-4) = sqrt(1.5)/100. DownsideDeviationNegativesOnly = sqrt(0.0018/(4-1)) = sqrt(6e-4) = sqrt(6)/100. SortinoFull = 0.015/sqrt(1.5e-4) = sqrt(1.5); SortinoNeg = 0.015/sqrt(6e-4) = sqrt(0.375); the Full/Neg ratio is sqrt(N/(k-1))=sqrt(12/3)=2, the same convention gap the 2026-06-25 RD review measured (code 1.59 vs textbook 2.76). Omega(0): gains sum=0.26, losses sum=0.08, ratio=3.25; Omega(mean=0.015)=1.0 by construction.

cases.description: SortinoRatioNegativesOnly R MAR=0 = sqrt(0.375) (understates vs full-sample by factor 2)
